---
title: "H3K27ac_PCA"
output: html_document
date: "2026-01-22"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	echo = TRUE,
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE,
	dev = c("png","pdf")
)

# ---- AUTO-SAVE PNG + PDF FOR EVERY PLOT ----
knitr::knit_hooks$set(plot = function(x, options) {
  outdir <- "docs"
  dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE)

  # Base filename (chunk label or auto-generated)
  name <- options$label
  if (is.null(name) || name == "") {
    name <- paste0("plot-", knitr::opts_current$get("chunk.id"))
  }

  # Save PNG
  pngfile <- file.path(outdir, paste0(name, ".png"))
  grDevices::png(pngfile, width = 800, height = 600, res = 120)
  print(x)
  grDevices::dev.off()

  # Save PDF
  pdffile <- file.path(outdir, paste0(name, ".pdf"))
  grDevices::pdf(pdffile, width = 7, height = 5)
  print(x)
  grDevices::dev.off()

  # Return plot to appear in the knitted document
  knitr::hook_plot_md(x, options)
})
```


```{r Setting_Up_Enviroment, results="hide"}

####Library Loading####
library("edgeR")
library("ggplot2")
library("tibble")
library("dplyr")
library("ggrepel")
library("readr")
library("org.Hs.eg.db")
library("AnnotationDbi")
library("pheatmap")
library("Cormotif")
library("tidyverse")
library("workflowr")
library("RUVSeq")
library("SummarizedExperiment")
library("readxl")
library("ggfortify")
library("ComplexHeatmap")

# BiocManager::install("SummarizedExperiment")

H3K27ac_Metadata <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_Metadata.RDS")
ann_colors <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/ann_Colors.RDS")

```

#Reproducible2
##AllDays
```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible2_PCA_PC1_PC2, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")

log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$CellLine,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  ggtitle(
  "H3K27ac PC1–PC2
  Reproducible in 2 individuals of a Species-Timepoint"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

```
 
```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible2_PCA_PC1_PC2_OutliersRemoved, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")

counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$CellLine,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
 ggtitle(
"H3K27ac PC1–PC2
Reproducible in 2 individuals of a Species-Timepoint
Outliers Removed"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )



```


##No4
```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible2_PCA_PC1_PC2_No4, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>%
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4") 

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$CellLine,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  ggtitle(
  "H3K27ac PC1–PC2
  Reproducible in 2 individuals of a Species-Timepoint
  Day 5 Cardiac Mesoderm"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

```
 
 
```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible2_PCA_PC1_PC2_No4_OutliersRemoved, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>%
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$CellLine,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  ggtitle(
  "H3K27ac PC1–PC2
  Reproducible in 2 individuals of a Species-Timepoint
  Day 5 Cardic Mesoderm
  Outliers Removed"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )


```

##No5
 
```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible2_PCA_PC1_PC2_No5_OutliersRemoved, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day5")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>%
  filter(Timepoint!="Day5") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$CellLine,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  ggtitle(
  "H3K27ac PC1–PC2
  Reproducible in 2 individuals of a Species-Timepoint
  Day 4 Cardic Mesoderm
  Outliers Removed"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )


```

#Filt Reproducible2
##AllDays
```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible2_PCA_PC1_PC2_Filtered, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS")

log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$CellLine,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  ggtitle(
  "H3K27ac PC1–PC2 \n Reproducible 2  \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

```
 
```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible2_PCA_PC1_PC2_OutliersRemoved_Filtered, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS")

counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)


#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$CellLine,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
 ggtitle(
"H3K27ac PC1–PC2 \n Reproducible 2  \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4 \n Outerliers Removed"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )



```

##No4
```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible2_PCA_PC1_PC2_No4_Filtered, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>%
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4") 

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$CellLine,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  ggtitle(
  "H3K27ac PC1–PC2 \n Day 5 Cardiac Mesoderm \n Reproducible 2  \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4 "
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

```
 
 
```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible2_PCA_PC1_PC2_No4_OutliersRemoved_Filtered, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>%
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$Individual,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  ggtitle(
  "H3K27ac PC1–PC2 \n Day 5 Cardiac Mesoderm \n Reproducible 2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4 \n Outliers Removed"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )


```


#Promoters Filt Reproducible2
```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible2_PCA_PC1_PC2_Filtered_Promoters, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS")

log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$CellLine,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  ggtitle(
  "H3K27ac PC1–PC2 \n Reproducible 2  \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4 \n Promoters"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

```

```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible2_PCA_PC1_PC2_OutliersRemoved_Filtered_Promoters, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS")

counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)


#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$CellLine,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
 ggtitle(
"H3K27ac PC1–PC2 \n Reproducible 2  \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4 \n Promoters \n Outerliers Removed"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )



```

##No4
```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible2_PCA_PC1_PC2_No4_Filtered_Promoters, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>%
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4") 

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$CellLine,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  ggtitle(
  "H3K27ac PC1–PC2 \n Day 5 Cardiac Mesoderm \n Reproducible 2  \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4 \n Promoters"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

```
 
 
```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible2_PCA_PC1_PC2_No4_OutliersRemoved_Filtered_Promoters, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/Promoters_H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc_FilteredCondition.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>%
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$CellLine,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  ggtitle(
  "H3K27ac PC1–PC2 \n Day 5 Cardiac Mesoderm \n Reproducible 2 \n Filtered by Condition - CPM>2 in >4 \n Promoters \n Outliers Removed"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )


```

 
 
```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible2_PCA_PC1_PC2_No5_OutliersRemoved_Filtered_Promoters, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible2_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day5")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>%
  filter(Timepoint!="Day5") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$CellLine,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  ggtitle(
  "H3K27ac PC1–PC2
  Reproducible in 2 individuals of a Species-Timepoint
  Day 4 Cardic Mesoderm
  Outliers Removed"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )


```

#Reproducible3
##AllDays
```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible3_PCA_PC1_PC2, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")

log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$CellLine,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  ggtitle(
  "H3K27ac PC1–PC2
  Reproducible in 3 individuals of a Species-Timepoint"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

```
 
```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible3_PCA_PC1_PC2_OutliersRemoved, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")

counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$CellLine,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
 ggtitle(
"H3K27ac PC1–PC2
Reproducible in 3 individuals of a Species-Timepoint
Outliers Removed"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )



```


##No4
```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible3_PCA_PC1_PC2_No4, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>%
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4") 

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$CellLine,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  ggtitle(
  "H3K27ac PC1–PC2
  Reproducible in 3 individuals of a Species-Timepoint
  Day 5 Cardiac Mesoderm"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

```
 
 
```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible3_PCA_PC1_PC2_No4_OutliersRemoved, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>%
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$CellLine,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  ggtitle(
  "H3K27ac PC1–PC2
  Reproducible in 3 individuals of a Species-Timepoint
  Day 5 Cardic Mesoderm
  Outliers Removed"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )


```

##No5
```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible3_PCA_PC1_PC2_No5, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day5"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>%
  filter(Timepoint!="Day5") 

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$CellLine,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  ggtitle(
  "H3K27ac PC1–PC2
  Reproducible in 3 individuals of a Species-Timepoint
  Day 4 Cardiac Mesoderm"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

```
 
 
```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible3_PCA_PC1_PC2_No5_OutliersRemoved, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible3_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day5")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>%
  filter(Timepoint!="Day5") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$CellLine,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  ggtitle(
  "H3K27ac PC1–PC2
  Reproducible in 3 individuals of a Species-Timepoint
  Day 4 Cardic Mesoderm
  Outliers Removed"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )


```

#Reproducible4
##AllDays
```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible4_PCA_PC1_PC2, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")

log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$CellLine,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  ggtitle(
  "H3K27ac PC1–PC2
  Reproducible in 4 individuals of a Species-Timepoint"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

```
 
```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible4_PCA_PC1_PC2_OutliersRemoved, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")

counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)
metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$CellLine,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
 ggtitle(
"H3K27ac PC1–PC2
Reproducible in 4 individuals of a Species-Timepoint
Outliers Removed"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )



```


##No4
```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible4_PCA_PC1_PC2_No4, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>%
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4") 

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$CellLine,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  ggtitle(
  "H3K27ac PC1–PC2
  Reproducible in 4 individuals of a Species-Timepoint
  Day 5 Cardiac Mesoderm"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

```
 
 
```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible4_PCA_PC1_PC2_No4_OutliersRemoved, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>%
  filter(Timepoint!="Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$CellLine,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  ggtitle(
  "H3K27ac PC1–PC2
  Reproducible in 4 individuals of a Species-Timepoint
  Day 5 Cardic Mesoderm
  Outliers Removed"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )


```

##No5
```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible4_PCA_PC1_PC2_No5, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day5"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>%
  filter(Timepoint!="Day5") 

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$CellLine,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  ggtitle(
  "H3K27ac PC1–PC2
  Reproducible in 4 individuals of a Species-Timepoint
  Day 4 Cardiac Mesoderm"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

```
 
 
```{r H3K27ac_Reproducible4_PCA_PC1_PC2_No5_OutliersRemoved, fig.height=6,fig.width=8}

counts <- readRDS("data/Data_Sets/H3K27ac_hg38_Reproducible4_fc.RDS")
counts <- counts %>% 
  dplyr::select(!matches("Day5")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3647_Day30")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C40210_Day15")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("C3649_Day4")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-contains("H24280_Day2"))
log2cpm <- cpm(counts, log=TRUE)

metadata <- H3K27ac_Metadata %>%
  filter(Timepoint!="Day5") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3647_Day30") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C40210_Day15") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "C3649_Day4") %>% 
  filter(SampleName != "H24280_Day2")

metadata <- metadata %>%
  dplyr::filter(SampleName %in% colnames(counts)) %>%
  dplyr::slice(match(colnames(counts), SampleName))


prcomp <- prcomp(t(log2cpm), scale=FALSE, center = TRUE)
prcomp_meta <- prcomp$x %>% cbind(., metadata)
#PCA checks
#k=1

ggplot2::autoplot(
    prcomp,
    data = prcomp_meta,
    colour = "Timepoint",
    shape  = "Species",
    size   = 4,
    x = 1,
    y = 2
) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$timepoint_cor) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    label = prcomp_meta$CellLine,
    vjust = -0.5,
    max.overlaps = 50
  ) +
  ggtitle(
  "H3K27ac PC1–PC2
  Reproducible in 4 individuals of a Species-Timepoint
  Day 4 Cardic Mesoderm
  Outliers Removed"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )


```



```{r Updating Website, eval = FALSE}

# git -> commit all changes
# git -> push
wflow_publish("analysis/H3K27ac_PCA.Rmd")

```
